title: The Roman 'Superfood' That Wasn't Exactly Healthy
title_full: The Roman 'Superfood' That Wasn't Exactly Healthy #Shorts #facts #didyouknow #ancienthistory
description: Ancient Romans had a favorite condiment called Garum, a fermented fish sauce. While it was a sign of wealth and used like modern ketchup, its high salt content wasn't great for health! Follow for more! #Shorts
